ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ١
ayahs.translation: I swear by the Day of Resurrection

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ ٢
ayahs.translation: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ ٣
ayahs.translation: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?

ayahs.textUthmani: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: بَلٰى قٰدِرِيۡنَ عَلٰٓى اَنۡ نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهٗ‏
ayahs.translation: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ يُرِيدُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ لِيَفْجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ ٥
ayahs.translation: But man desires to continue in sin.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَسْــَٔلُ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ٦
ayahs.translation: He asks, "When is the Day of Resurrection?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا بَرِقَ ٱلْبَصَرُ ٧
ayahs.translation: So when vision is dazzled.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَخَسَفَ ٱلْقَمَرُ ٨
ayahs.translation: And the moon darkens.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ ٩
ayahs.translation: And the sun and the moon are joined,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ أَيْنَ ٱلْمَفَرُّ ١٠
ayahs.translation: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَ ١١
ayahs.translation: No! There is no refuge.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ ١٢
ayahs.translation: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.

ayahs.textUthmani: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يُنَبَّؤُاْ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذِۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: يُنَبَّؤُا الۡاِنۡسَانُ يَوۡمَٮِٕذٍۢ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَاَخَّرَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.
ayahs.transliteration: Yunabba-'ul insaanu yawma-'izim bimaa qaddama Wa-akhkhar

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٌ ١٤
ayahs.translation: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَوْ أَلْقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ ١٥
ayahs.translation: Even if he presents his excuses.

ayahs.textUthmani: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: لَا تُحَرِّكۡ بِهٖ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعۡجَلَ بِهٖؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muḥammad], to hasten with it [i.e., recitation of the Qur’ān].
ayahs.transliteration: Laa tuharrik bihee lisaa-naka lita'jala bih

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ ١٧
ayahs.translation: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا قَرَأْنَـٰهُ فَٱتَّبِعْ قُرْءَانَهُۥ ١٨
ayahs.translation: So when We have recited it [through Gabriel], then follow its recitation.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ ١٩
ayahs.translation: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: No! But you [i.e., mankind] love the immediate

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَتَذَرُونَ ٱلْأَخِرَةَ ٢١
ayahs.translation: And leave [i.e., neglect] the Hereafter.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاضِرَةٌ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: Looking at their Lord.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذِۭ بَاسِرَةٌ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفْعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِىَ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: No! When it [i.e., the soul] has reached the collar bones

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقِيلَ مَنْۜ رَاقٍ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلْفِرَاقُ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: And he [i.e., the dying one] is certain that it is the [time of] separation

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ ٢٩
ayahs.translation: And the leg is wound about the leg,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ ٣١
ayahs.translation: And he [i.e., the disbeliever] had not believed, nor had he prayed.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَـٰكِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: But [instead], he denied and turned away.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: Woe to you, and woe!

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰٓ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: Then woe to you, and woe!

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى ٣٦
ayahs.translation: Does man think that he will be left neglected?

ayahs.textUthmani: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اَلَمۡ يَكُ نُطۡفَةً مِّنۡ مَّنِىٍّ يُّمۡنٰىۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted?
ayahs.transliteration: Alam yaku nutfatam mim maniyyiny yumnaa

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allāh] created [his form] and proportioned [him]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَجَعَلَ مِنْهُ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.

ayahs.textUthmani: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَيْسَ ذَٲلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْــِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اَلَيۡسَ ذٰلِكَ بِقٰدِرٍ عَلٰٓى اَنۡ يُّحۡـىِۦَ الۡمَوۡتٰى‏
ayahs.translation: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?
ayahs.transliteration: Alaisa zaalika biqaadirin 'alaaa any yuhyiyal mawtaa
